_meta.notes: Family lockouts are the second-most-common cause of failed applications, after 5/24. Track the FAMILY-level rules separately from per-product rules.

chase_sapphire.rule: Family-level 48-month SUB lockout. Cannot earn SUB on any Sapphire if you currently hold any OR earned a Sapphire SUB in past 48 months.
chase_sapphire.workaround: Product-change Sapphire to Freedom Unlimited or Freedom Flex before reapplying. Wait 48 months from prior SUB earn date.

chase_ink.rule: NO family-level lockout (as of 2026). Each card has its own 24-month SUB clock per product.
chase_ink.workaround: Stagger applications 1/30 (or 1/90 to be safe) and rotate through all four products.
chase_ink.notes: Ink applications are submitted through chase.com/business; many users churn 2-3 Inks per year between P1 and P2.

amex_platinum.rule: Each variant has its OWN once-per-lifetime SUB clock. Personal Plat and Business Plat are separate. Schwab/MS/Goldman flavors are separate from Personal Plat.
amex_platinum.tier_blocking_2023: Holding Personal Platinum blocks future Personal Gold AND Personal Green bonuses (Fall 2023 Amex family rule). Does NOT affect Business Plat/Gold/Green eligibility.
amex_platinum.workaround: After earning Personal Plat SUB, you can still get Schwab Plat SUB and Business Plat SUB. To capture Gold + Green bonuses, get them BEFORE Plat.
amex_platinum.notes: Watch for offer-language variations. Some elevated offers explicitly omit the 'related cards' language; those are the SUB-second-time opportunities.

amex_personal_charge_ladder.rule: Fall 2023 family tier-blocking: holding a 'higher' card permanently blocks 'lower' card SUBs. Plat blocks Gold + Green; Gold blocks Green.
amex_personal_charge_ladder.workaround: Capture in order Green -> Gold -> Plat to get all three bonuses. If you already have Plat, the Gold + Green bonuses are gone for life on personal side.
sources: m16p flowchart NOTES FOR AMEX CARD-FAMILY RULES

amex_gold.rule: Personal Gold and Business Gold are separate SUB clocks.
amex_gold.tier_blocking_2023: Holding Personal Gold blocks future Personal Green bonus (Fall 2023). Does NOT affect Business Gold or Business Green.

amex_blue_cash.rule: Fall 2023 family tier-blocking applies. Holding a higher tier blocks lower-tier bonuses.

amex_personal_delta.rule: Per-product once-per-lifetime PLUS Fall 2023 tier-blocking on personal Delta family. Holding Reserve blocks Plat/Gold/Blue future bonuses on personal side.

amex_delta.rule: Each product has its own once-per-lifetime clock per offer terms. Business and personal versions of same tier are separate.

amex_hilton.rule: Each product has separate once-per-lifetime. Often elevated offers via Resy or referral.

amex_bonvoy.rule: Cross-issuer lockout with Chase Bonvoy cards. See application-rules.json -> cross_issuer_rules.chase_amex_marriott_24mo.

chase_marriott.rule: Cross-issuer lockout with Amex Bonvoy cards. 24-month SUB clock per product, with cross-family restrictions.

citi_strata.rule: 48-month SUB rule per product, with some offers extending lockout across the Strata family. Read offer terms.

citi_aadvantage.rule: Each product has a 48-month SUB clock. Cross-issuer with Barclays AAdvantage Aviator.

barclays_aadvantage.rule: 24-month SUB clock per product. Often the only path to a second AA SUB after Citi AA, since Barclays is a separate issuer.

capital_one_venture.rule: 48-month SUB clock per product on most. Venture X has its own.

bilt_2_0.issuer: Column N.A. (post-2026 relaunch; replaces original Bilt Mastercard issued by Wells Fargo)
bilt_2_0.rule: Family-wide once-per-lifetime SUB across all three Bilt 2.0 cards. Per the welcome bonus eligibility wording: 'available only to those who do not currently hold a Bilt Card 2.0 issued by Column N.A., have not previously held a Bilt Card 2.0, and have not received a Bilt Card 2.0 welcome bonus in the past.'
bilt_2_0.workaround: Pick the right tier on first try — you only get one Bilt 2.0 SUB ever. Palladium for high spenders who want the lounge + status + biggest SUB; Obsidian for moderate spend with category multipliers; Blue for free-AF rent-payment access.

subs_at_launch.palladium: 50,000 points + Bilt Gold Status + $300 Bilt Cash

bilt_2_0.tpg_affiliate_bonus: 5x points on non-housing for first 5 days when applying through The Points Guy affiliate link
bilt_2_0.notes: Original Bilt Mastercard (Wells Fargo issued, pre-2026) is a SEPARATE product with a separate (and now historical) SUB clock. Having held the original Bilt does NOT block Bilt 2.0 SUB eligibility. New cards have housing as 'up to 1X' (capped), with option to either waive the housing fee (no points) or pay the fee in Bilt Cash to earn points. Housing payments treated as NPSL.

members: Bilt Mastercard (Wells Fargo, pre-2026 — discontinued for new applications)
bilt_1_0_legacy.rule: Original product. NO traditional SUB ever offered. Earning was via 'Rent Day' double points and 1x rent payments. Replaced by Bilt 2.0 family in 2026.
